name: M:GTA.Audio.PlaySoundAt(GTA.Math.Vector3,System.String,System.String)
summary: Plays a sound from the game's sound files at the specified
returns: The identifier of the active sound effect instance.

params.name: position
params.description: The world coordinates to play the sound at.

params.name: soundSet
params.description: The name of the sound inside the file.
